languages.original_text: "Detecting interference in the ship's systems by an unknown person with the status 'Genetor Extremis.' Affiliation with the Tech-Priesthood of the forge world Stygies VIII detected. Potential interest in theological debate with the new unit has been logged."

languages.text: "Зафиксировано вмешательство в системы корабля неизвестным лицом статуса "генетор экстремис". Зафиксирована принадлежность к технодуховенству мира-кузницы Стигия VIII. Отмечен потенциальный интерес к богословским дебатам с новой единицей".

"Detecting interference in the ship's systems by an unknown person with the status 'Genetor Extremis.' Affiliation with the Tech-Priesthood of the forge world Stygies VIII detected. Potential interest in theological debate with the new unit has been logged."
languages.original_text: "Зафиксировано вмешательство в системы корабля неизвестным лицом статуса "генетор экстремис". Зафиксирована принадлежность к технодуховенству мира-кузницы Стигия VIII. Отмечен потенциальный интерес к богословским дебатам с новой единицей".

"Detecting interference in the ship's systems by an unknown person with the status 'Genetor Extremis.' Affiliation with the Tech-Priesthood of the forge world Stygies VIII detected. Potential interest in theological debate with the new unit has been logged."

"Detecting interference in the ship's systems by an unknown person with the status 'Genetor Extremis.' Affiliation with the Tech-Priesthood of the forge world Stygies VIII detected. Potential interest in theological debate with the new unit has been logged."

languages.text: 「未知の者である『ジェネター・エクストレミス』のステータスを持つ者が艦のシステムに干渉していることを検知。鍛冶世界スティギウス8世のテクノロジー司祭団との関連が確認された。新ユニットとの神学論争への関心がある可能性が記録された」
languages.original_text: "Detecting interference in the ship's systems by an unknown person with the status 'Genetor Extremis.' Affiliation with the Tech-Priesthood of the forge world Stygies VIII detected. Potential interest in theological debate with the new unit has been logged."

traits.locale_text: 「未知の者である『ジェネター・エクストレミス』のステータスを持つ者が艦のシステムに干渉していることを検知。鍛冶世界スティギウス8世のテクノロジー司祭団との関連が確認された。新ユニットとの神学論争への関心がある可能性が記録された。」

languages.text: « Détection d'interférences dans les systèmes du vaisseau, provoquées par un individu inconnu doté du statut de "Genetor Extremis". Affiliation avec les technoprêtres du monde forge Stygies VIII confirmée. Enregistrement d'un intérêt potentiel pour un débat théologique avec la nouvelle unité. »
languages.original_text: "Detecting interference in the ship's systems by an unknown person with the status 'Genetor Extremis.' Affiliation with the Tech-Priesthood of the forge world Stygies VIII detected. Potential interest in theological debate with the new unit has been logged."

traits.locale_text: « Détection d'interférences dans les systèmes du vaisseau, provoquées par un individu inconnu doté du statut de "Genetor Extremis". Affiliation avec les technoprêtres du monde forge Stygies VIII confirmée. Enregistrement d'un intérêt potentiel pour un débat théologique avec la nouvelle unité. »

languages.text: "Eine unbekannte Person mit dem Status 'Genetor Extremis' greift auf die Systeme des Schiffs zu. Zugehörigkeit zur Techpriesterschaft der Fabrikwelt Stygies VIII erkannt. Potenzielles Interesse an einer theologischen Debatte mit der neuen Einheit protokolliert."
languages.original_text: "Detecting interference in the ship's systems by an unknown person with the status 'Genetor Extremis.' Affiliation with the Tech-Priesthood of the forge world Stygies VIII detected. Potential interest in theological debate with the new unit has been logged."

traits.locale_text: "Eine unbekannte Person mit dem Status 'Genetor Extremis' greift auf die Systeme des Schiffs zu. Zugehörigkeit zur Techpriesterschaft der Fabrikwelt Stygies VIII erkannt. Potenzielles Interesse an einer theologischen Debatte mit der neuen Einheit protokolliert."

languages.text: "'Genetör Extremis' statüsüne sahip bilinmeyen bir kimse tarafından gemi sistemlerine müdahale tespit ediliyor. Stygies VIII döküm dünyasının Tekno Rahipliği ile bağlantı saptandı. Yeni birimle teolojik tartışmaya yönelik potansiyel ilgi kaydedildi."
languages.original_text: "Detecting interference in the ship's systems by an unknown person with the status 'Genetor Extremis.' Affiliation with the Tech-Priesthood of the forge world Stygies VIII detected. Potential interest in theological debate with the new unit has been logged."

traits.locale_text: "'Genetör Extremis' statüsüne sahip bilinmeyen bir kimse tarafından gemi sistemlerine müdahale tespit ediliyor. Stygies VIII döküm dünyasının Tekno Rahipliği ile bağlantı saptandı. Yeni birimle teolojik tartışmaya yönelik potansiyel ilgi kaydedildi."

languages.text: «Los sistemas de la nave están siendo interferidos por alguien con el rango "Genetor Extremis". Se ha detectado su afiliación con el tecnosacerdocio del mundo forja Stygies VIII. Anotado un posible interés en mantener un debate teológico con la nueva unidad».
languages.original_text: "Detecting interference in the ship's systems by an unknown person with the status 'Genetor Extremis.' Affiliation with the Tech-Priesthood of the forge world Stygies VIII detected. Potential interest in theological debate with the new unit has been logged."

traits.locale_text: «Los sistemas de la nave están siendo interferidos por alguien con el rango "Genetor Extremis". Se ha detectado su afiliación con el tecnosacerdocio del mundo forja Stygies VIII. Anotado un posible interés en mantener un debate teológico con la nueva unidad».

languages.text: “侦测到舰船系统遭到未知身份者的干扰，目标身份标记为‘特级基因士’。检测到其与铸造世界斯泰吉斯8号的技术神甫存在关联。已记录其与新单位进行神学辩论的潜在兴趣。”
languages.original_text: "Detecting interference in the ship's systems by an unknown person with the status 'Genetor Extremis.' Affiliation with the Tech-Priesthood of the forge world Stygies VIII detected. Potential interest in theological debate with the new unit has been logged."

traits.locale_text: “侦测到舰船系统遭到未知身份者的干扰，目标身份标记为‘特级基因士’。检测到其与铸造世界斯泰吉斯8号的技术神甫存在关联。已记录其与新单位进行神学辩论的潜在兴趣。”
